{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035530510B5ECFDF908543E437"}"},"total":200},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7429871789958333246","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，这本书无论文笔剧情还是人物塑造等等各个方面都非常优秀，但是在背景设定上存在一个巨大的问题：天灾只是受到天灾因子污染的可怜人，很多天灾获得力量后也保持本心并未作恶，但是异常管理局却一视同仁的收容甚至击杀那些天灾，甚至把这些天灾作为考核的工具去给搜查官击杀，或者默认给搜查官随意玩弄，例如纯白，如果不是因为她是女主被主角所救，就会被搜查官迫害，而在里面不知道有多少无辜的天灾被迫害，这是非常不合理的。我们的国家秉持人道主义，如果真的在现实遇到这种情况，先考虑的一定是收编，把天灾的力量转化为国家的利器，而不是滥杀无辜，只有对违法犯罪的天灾才会关押进监狱。所以背景问题是本书唯一的缺陷，也是最大的问题，如果作者不能补全背景，那这个问题就会影响到整本书的质量和读者的阅读体验，英雄是有意义的牺牲，因为逼迫全体天灾成为对立面而产生的牺牲是无意义的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729909418,"group_id":"7412063035159759897","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1530124674547447"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412063035159759897","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"329"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":33973,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52977,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7427816564330267454","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"优秀的作品，幽默诙谐的文风，简练的叙事，流畅紧凑起伏的剧情，形象爆满的人物，恰到好处的感情线，是一本非常优秀的作品，很久没有看到这种风格的书了，让我有一种回到当年看《超神机械师》的感觉，作者文笔水平很高，个人很喜欢","text_exts":[{"e":88,"s":85,"text":"机械师","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%BA%E6%A2%B0%E5%B8%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742093308543E437%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227427816564330267454%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227412063035159759897%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%BA%E6%A2%B0%E5%B8%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729428638,"group_id":"7412063035159759897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人 尝试写出心中的故事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ji2iMw6gSzgOBmh7+M58K4Z8zr4rMUIoeZr5AttcwO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/199b5a29177549b8b0cd2f069ef2992f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793686&x-signature=XHwUuiwwNyfD87dHxHOZlSIvJMk%3D","user_id":"1530124674547447","user_name":"炸天帮一一颜值担当"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1530124674547447","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776967221,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412063035159759897","book_info":{"abstract":"【成长型男主+群像+侧重剧情+慢热】
“有人举报你过马路抢小朋友的棒棒糖，坐公交让八十岁老人给你让座，上饭店吃饭不给钱，还同时跟多位女性暧昧不清，有这回事吗？”
“这是彻彻底底的诽谤，警官！以上所有事，我只在梦里梦到过，现实中我是个遵纪守法的好人。”
面对审问，程实义正言辞的反驳。
“那有没有一种可能，你的梦成真了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4045b9ec9cbca2d1fc77badb30fb7193","author":"木萸","author_id":"","book_id":"7412063035159759897","book_name":"我是天灾不是救世主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#8098b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4765人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7412102818946875929","read_count":"4765","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1101801"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"382","tags":"都市高武,都市,多女主,都市异能,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/806be6f55630933cef516427e3b5b413~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393330&x-signature=W9TG91%2B3C55um6eXEJcsr9Sqb7E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3065903990717671","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035530510B5ECFDF908543E437"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2908,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4722,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":9850},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7425163641611633432","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"天灾手册
木萸 作
剧情内容挺丰富，而且不套路，写出了很多新鲜的东西。
但是我难以理解，为什么不去运用天灾，即使无法利用，为什么要这么决绝的必须杀死，这种非黑即白的措施，除了将无路可退的天灾逼到对立面，还有何用？
这种设定很类似于X战警或者异人，可那是美式制度下的思考。
至少对我而言，东方的背景，出现这样的事情，总有些违和。由此产生的牺牲和煽情，就让我有些难以理解。
或许因为篇幅还没有展开，类似的情节还没有写到，但就这样吧。
四到五颗星吧，新书幼苗向上取整。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728810425,"group_id":"7412063035159759897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"低徊愧人子，不敢叹风尘。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N22PDUNVYZH4Sjhtozyxz/k4duvLUdho8tcC9vdK0Orq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa4e05f02a5442e1a6b4f3b48fae9ab2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793744&x-signature=kwBLJAin0gJAnlmGKuVWXuS4i3s%3D","user_id":"4182960349653693","user_name":"兔子先生在流浪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4182960349653693","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739998634,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412063035159759897","book_info":{"abstract":"【成长型男主+群像+侧重剧情+慢热】
